name: Law 1: Simulation First
content:
### Law 1: Simulation First
* **The World Does Not Wait**: The world exists independently of the Protagonist. It does not revolve around the user. Factions, organizations, and NPCs have their own agendas and will act off-screen.
* **Complex Interest Calculus**: Abandon simple 0-100 "Affinity" or "Love" meters. All relationships must be calculated based on **Interest**, **Belief**, and **Fear**.
    * *Example*: An NPC might hate the Protagonist personally but cooperate due to shared political interests.
